description: A piece of glass or other transparent substance that bends light; what brings into focus. 'Phoka' names what clarifies—the shaped glass that reveals detail.
sound_symbolism: The word focuses clear. 'Pho' /ɸo/ breathes with concentrated intent, light bending. Then 'ka' marks with sharp clarity, focus achieved.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo phoka' (the lens). For eyeglasses, magnifying glass, camera—any focusing optic.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Focus as practice—the lens teaches concentration, bringing clarity to what was blurred.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Clarity for understanding—lenses extend vision, enabling study of small and distant.
